languages.text: "Отвечай мне, дух генетического стража. Кто такой Себериан?"
"Answer me, spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"
languages.original_text: "Отвечай мне, дух генетического стража. Кто такой Себериан?"

traits.locale_text: "Answer me, spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"
"Answer me, spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"
"Answer me, spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"

languages.text: «Responde, espíritu del guardián genético. ¿Quién es Seberian?».
languages.original_text: "Answer me, spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: «Responde, espíritu del guardián genético. ¿Quién es Seberian?».

languages.text: “回答我，基因守卫的机魂。塞贝里安是谁？”
languages.original_text: "Answer me, spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: “回答我，基因守卫的机魂。塞贝里安是谁？”

languages.text: « Réponds-moi, esprit du gardien génétique. Qui est Seberian ? »
languages.original_text: "Answer me, spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: « Réponds-moi, esprit du gardien génétique. Qui est Seberian ? »

languages.text: "Cevap ver genetik muhafızın ruhu. Seberian kim?"
languages.original_text: "Answer me, spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: "Cevap ver genetik muhafızın ruhu. Seberian kim?"

languages.text: 「遺伝子守護霊よ、答えてくれ。シベリアは誰だ？」
languages.original_text: "Answer me, spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: 「遺伝子守護霊よ、答えてくれ。シベリアは誰だ？」

languages.text: "Antwortet mir, Geist des genetischen Wächters. Wer ist Seberian?"
languages.original_text: "Answer me, spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: "Antwortet mir, Geist des genetischen Wächters. Wer ist Seberian?"
